cases.description: Verify the complete application flow from the Splash Screen to the Home Screen using the Sign Up Later option.
steps: 1. Install the application on the device.
2. Launch the application.
3. Verify that the Splash Screen displays the HP logo with the "sprocket" text in the center of the screen.
4. Wait until the Splash Screen is completed automatically.
5. Verify that the first onboarding screen is displayed with the Sprocket logo, onboarding image, page indicator, title, description, and "Swipe to continue." text.
6. Swipe from right to left to navigate to the second onboarding screen.
7. Verify that the second onboarding screen displays the Sprocket logo, AI image, page indicator, "AI Editing & Generation" title, description, and "Swipe to continue." text.
8. Swipe from right to left to navigate to the third onboarding screen.
9. Verify that the third onboarding screen displays the Sprocket logo, image stack, page indicator, "Inkless & Seamless" title, description, compatibility note, and "Swipe to continue." text.
10. Swipe from right to left to navigate to the fourth onboarding screen.
11. Verify that the fourth onboarding screen displays the Sprocket logo, onboarding image, page indicator, "Unleash Your Creativity" title, description, and the green "Get Started!" button.
12. Tap the "Get Started!" button.
13. Verify that the Sign Up screen is displayed.
14. Verify that the "I already have an account" button is displayed.
15. Verify that the "Sign Up Later" button is displayed.
16. Tap the "Sign Up Later" button.
17. Verify that the green loading indicator is displayed for a few seconds.
18. Verify that the Home screen is displayed successfully.
cases.expected: The application successfully navigates from the Splash Screen to the Home Screen.

verifications.description: Verify the complete application flow from the Splash Screen to the Home Screen using the Sign Up Later option.
verifications.expected: The application successfully navigates from the Splash Screen to the Home Screen.

verifications.description: Verify the complete application flow from the Splash Screen to the Home Screen using the Sign Up Later option.
verifications.expected: The application successfully navigates from the Splash Screen to the Home Screen.
verifications.verification: Verify navigation marker: Sign Up Later

cases.description: Verify the notification permission popup and the Allow button functionality.
steps: 1. Install the application on the device.
2. Launch the application.
3. Complete the Splash Screen.
4. Complete all four onboarding screens by swiping from right to left.
5. Tap the "Get Started!" button.
6. Tap the "Sign Up Later" button.
7. Verify that the green loading indicator is displayed.
8. Verify that the Home screen is displayed.
9. Verify that the notification permission popup is displayed at the bottom of the screen.
10. Verify that the popup title displays "Allow Sprocket to send you notifications?".
11. Verify that the "Allow" button is displayed.
12. Verify that the "Don't allow" button is displayed.
13. Tap the "Allow" button.
14. If the operating system notification permission dialog is displayed, tap the "Allow" button.
15. Verify that the notification permission popup is hidden.
16. Verify that the Home screen remains displayed without any issue.
cases.expected: The popup is dismissed after tapping Allow, and the Home screen remains visible.

verifications.description: Verify the notification permission popup and the Allow button functionality.
verifications.expected: The popup is dismissed after tapping Allow, and the Home screen remains visible.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

cases.description: Verify the notification permission popup and the Don't allow button functionality.
steps: 1. Install the application on the device.
2. Launch the application.
3. Complete the Splash Screen.
4. Complete all four onboarding screens by swiping from right to left.
5. Tap the "Get Started!" button.
6. Tap the "Sign Up Later" button.
7. Verify that the green loading indicator is displayed.
8. Verify that the Home screen is displayed.
9. Verify that the notification permission popup is displayed at the bottom of the screen.
10. Verify that the popup title displays "Allow Sprocket to send you notifications?".
11. Verify that the "Allow" button is displayed.
12. Verify that the "Don't allow" button is displayed.
13. Tap the "Don't allow" button.
14. Verify that the notification permission popup is hidden.
15. Verify that the Home screen remains displayed without any issue.
cases.expected: The popup is dismissed after tapping Don't allow, and the Home screen remains visible.

verifications.description: Verify the notification permission popup and the Don't allow button functionality.
verifications.expected: The popup is dismissed after tapping Don't allow, and the Home screen remains visible.

cases.description: Verify the Home screen user interface when the user is not logged in.
steps: 1. Install the application on the device.
2. Launch the application.
3. Complete the Splash Screen.
4. Complete all four onboarding screens by swiping from right to left.
5. Tap the "Get Started!" button.
6. Tap the "Sign Up Later" button.
7. Wait until the green loading indicator disappears.
8. Verify that the Home screen is displayed.
9. Close the notification permission popup by tapping either "Allow" or "Don't allow".
10. Verify that the top left side of the Home screen displays the "Log in" text.
11. Verify that the "Sprocket AI" card is displayed.
12. Verify that the text "Create with powerful AI tools" is displayed below the "Sprocket AI" title.
13. Verify that the "Quick Print" option is displayed.
14. Verify that the "Collage Maker" option is displayed.
15. Verify that the "Pre-Cut Stickers" option is displayed.
16. Verify that the "Tile Print" option is displayed.
17. Verify that the "Photobooth" option is displayed.
18. Verify that the "Photo ID" option is displayed.
19. Verify that the bottom navigation bar displays the "More", "Create", and "Printer" tabs.
20. Verify that the "Create" tab is highlighted by default.
cases.expected: All Home screen elements are displayed correctly for a user who is not logged in.

verifications.description: Verify the Home screen user interface when the user is not logged in.
verifications.expected: All Home screen elements are displayed correctly for a user who is not logged in.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen

cases.description: Verify the Home screen user interface when the user is logged in.
steps: 1. Install the application on the device.
2. Launch the application.
3. Complete the Splash Screen.
4. Complete all four onboarding screens by swiping from right to left.
5. Tap the "Get Started!" button.
6. Tap the "I already have an account" button.
7. Enter a valid email address and password.
8. Tap the "Log in" button.
9. Wait until the Home screen is displayed.
10. Verify that the top left side displays the text "Welcome,".
11. Verify that the logged-in user name is displayed below the "Welcome," text.
12. Verify that the "Sprocket AI" card is displayed.
13. Verify that the text "Create with powerful AI tools" is displayed below the "Sprocket AI" title.
14. Verify that the "Quick Print" option is displayed.
15. Verify that the "Collage Maker" option is displayed.
16. Verify that the "Pre-Cut Stickers" option is displayed.
17. Verify that the "Tile Print" option is displayed.
18. Verify that the "Photobooth" option is displayed.
19. Verify that the "Photo ID" option is displayed.
20. Verify that the bottom navigation bar displays the "More", "Create", and "Printer" tabs.
21. Verify that the "Create" tab is highlighted by default.
cases.expected: The logged-in user's name and all Home screen elements are displayed correctly.

verifications.description: Verify the Home screen user interface when the user is logged in.
verifications.expected: The logged-in user's name and all Home screen elements are displayed correctly.
verifications.verification: Manual/heuristic check — review expected result on current screen
